headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 24, 2026**
article:
The Cincinnati Reds edged out the Detroit Tigers 9-8 in a high-scoring matchup, with Matt McLain leading the charge at the plate. McLain hit two home runs and drove in four runs, while Graham Ashcraft earned the win on the mound. The Baltimore Orioles dominated the Boston Red Sox, winning 10-3 behind a strong performance from Adley Rutschman, who hit 3 home runs and drove in 6 runs. Brandon Young earned the win, pitching 5.2 innings with 5 strikeouts and 3 earned runs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their team's availability. The New York Yankees placed RHP Angel Chivilli on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder discomfort. The Cincinnati Reds placed 3B Eugenio Suárez on the 10-day injured list with a mild left oblique strain. The Toronto Blue Jays placed RF Nathan Lukes on the 10-day injured list with a left hamstring strain and transferred RHP Yimi García from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to right elbow ulnar nerve and AC joint surgery. The Chicago Cubs placed LHP Caleb Thielbar on the 15-day injured list with a left hamstring strain and transferred RHP Porter Hodge from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to a right elbow strain. The Tampa Bay Rays placed RHP Edwin Uceta on the 60-day injured list with right shoulder impingement. The Colorado Rockies placed RHP Ryan Feltner on the 15-day injured list with right ulnar nerve inflammation.

Several teams made roster moves and trades. The Toronto Blue Jays acquired C Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for RHP Ty Cummings. The Colorado Rockies traded 3B Nicky Lopez to the Chicago Cubs for cash. The Houston Astros traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake.

top_news.title: **Reds Rally Past Tigers in Thrilling 9-8 Finish**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds edged out the Detroit Tigers 9-8 in a high-scoring matchup, with Matt McLain leading the charge at the plate. McLain hit two home runs and drove in four runs, while Graham Ashcraft earned the win on the mound.

top_news.title: **Orioles Rout Red Sox 10-3**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles dominated the Boston Red Sox, winning 10-3 behind a strong performance from Adley Rutschman, who hit 3 home runs and drove in 6 runs. Brandon Young earned the win, pitching 5.2 innings with 5 strikeouts and 3 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling 8-6 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured an 8-6 win over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Angel Martínez leading the charge at the plate, going 2-for-4 with 2 home runs and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Edge Mets in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 4-3 victory over the New York Mets, with Michael Lorenzen earning the win.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Rout Orioles 17-1 in Dominant Performance**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a convincing 17-1 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with multiple players contributing to the high-scoring affair. Impact hitters for the Red Sox included Ceddanne Rafaela, Willson Contreras, Wilyer Abreu, Andruw Monasterio, Caleb Durbin, Isiah Kiner-Falefa, and Taylor Ward, while Garrett Crochet stood out among the team's pitchers.

top_news.title: **Mariners Pull Off Thrilling 11-9 Victory Over Cardinals**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners secured a hard-fought 11-9 win over the St. Louis Cardinals, marking a comeback victory. Cal Raleigh and Julio Rodríguez were among the key contributors for the Mariners.

top_news.title: **Yankees Place RHP Angel Chivilli on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees have placed RHP Angel Chivilli on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder discomfort, effective retroactive to April 23, 2026.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Catcher Willie MacIver**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired from the Texas Rangers in a trade for cash.
